---
title: "Upper Fibers and Witness Covers for the Fibonacci Order-of-Apparition Map"
subtitle: "Combinatorial number theory"
date: 2026-04-07
categories: [gen2, combinatorial, submitted]
target-journal: "Research in Number Theory"
status: "Submitted"
repo: "the-omega-institute/fibonacci-moduli-cross-resolution-arithmetic"
theorems: 29
featured: false
video: "https://github.com/the-omega-institute/fibonacci-moduli-cross-resolution-arithmetic/releases/download/media-v1/fibonacci_moduli_cross_resolution_video.mp4"
slides: "https://github.com/the-omega-institute/fibonacci-moduli-cross-resolution-arithmetic/releases/download/media-v1/fibonacci_moduli_cross_resolution_slides.pdf"
podcast: "https://github.com/the-omega-institute/fibonacci-moduli-cross-resolution-arithmetic/releases/download/media-v1/fibonacci_moduli_cross_resolution_podcast.wav"
description: "We introduce witness covers for the fiber B_n, proving B_n is an upper set in the divisor lattice. Minimal generators are classified via a primitive-vs-ladder dichotomy for atomic prime-power birth mo..."
---

## Abstract

We introduce witness covers for the fiber B_n, proving B_n is an upper set in the divisor lattice. Minimal generators are classified via a primitive-vs-ladder dichotomy for atomic prime-power birth moduli.

**Keywords:** Fibonacci sequences, rank of apparition, divisor lattices, multiplicative number theory

## Key Metrics

| Metric | Value |
|--------|-------|
| Machine-verified theorems | 29 |
| Target journal | Research in Number Theory |
| Status | Submitted |
| Scope | Combinatorial number theory |

## Infographic

![fibonacci_moduli_cross_resolution Infographic](https://github.com/the-omega-institute/fibonacci-moduli-cross-resolution-arithmetic/releases/download/media-v1/fibonacci_moduli_cross_resolution_infographic.png)

## Video Explainer

{{< video https://github.com/the-omega-institute/fibonacci-moduli-cross-resolution-arithmetic/releases/download/media-v1/fibonacci_moduli_cross_resolution_video.mp4 >}}

**Downloads:**

- [Slides (PDF)](https://github.com/the-omega-institute/fibonacci-moduli-cross-resolution-arithmetic/releases/download/media-v1/fibonacci_moduli_cross_resolution_slides.pdf)
- [Podcast (WAV)](https://github.com/the-omega-institute/fibonacci-moduli-cross-resolution-arithmetic/releases/download/media-v1/fibonacci_moduli_cross_resolution_podcast.wav)
- [Video (MP4)](https://github.com/the-omega-institute/fibonacci-moduli-cross-resolution-arithmetic/releases/download/media-v1/fibonacci_moduli_cross_resolution_video.mp4)

## Links

- [Full Paper (GitHub)](../../papers/fibonacci-moduli-cross-resolution-arithmetic/)
- [Lean 4 Proofs](https://github.com/the-omega-institute/automath/tree/dev-automation-integration/lean4)
- [Automath Engine](https://github.com/the-omega-institute/automath)
